service_areas.label: Woodstock — Oxford County
service_areas.bylaw_note: Woodstock jobs should stay on private property whenever possible. Street and winter parking restrictions can change by block, and unnecessary noise rules still apply during setup and cleanup.
service_areas.parking_rule: Prefer driveway or private-lot setup. Winter overnight street parking restrictions and posted parking limits are the main risk areas for mobile detailing support vehicles.
service_areas.noise_rule: Avoid prolonged engine, vacuum, or music noise near homes, especially early mornings and evenings.
service_areas.water_rule: Contain runoff and avoid letting wash water or debris migrate across the boulevard or into storm drains.
service_areas.access_rule: Confirm hose reach, outlet access, and turnaround room before dispatch.

service_areas.label: Tillsonburg — Oxford County
service_areas.bylaw_note: Tillsonburg work should stay on the customer driveway or private lot. Noise complaints and neighborhood bylaw calls are the biggest operational risk.
service_areas.parking_rule: Avoid street setup unless the customer has confirmed it is allowed and safe for the work truck or trailer.
service_areas.noise_rule: Reduce loud vacuums, compressors, and music near homes and keep setup/teardown tidy.
service_areas.water_rule: Keep water, cleaners, and debris on-site and controlled; do not assume curb runoff is acceptable.
service_areas.access_rule: Confirm driveway width, outlet access, and customer-supplied water before arrival.

service_areas.label: Ingersoll — Oxford County
service_areas.bylaw_note: Ingersoll jobs should prioritize private-property setup. Downtown and street-side work need extra parking attention, especially if the customer depends on permit or timed parking areas.
service_areas.parking_rule: Check posted street limits, downtown permit areas, and avoid blocking sidewalks or neighbour access.
service_areas.noise_rule: Keep louder detailing steps inside reasonable daytime hours and avoid idle-noise complaints.
service_areas.water_rule: Keep runoff controlled and do not let wastewater pool near sidewalks, curbs, or municipal lots.
service_areas.access_rule: Confirm private driveway space or off-street parking before dispatch.

service_areas.label: Norwich / Otterville — Oxford County
service_areas.bylaw_note: Norwich Township jobs often involve mixed town-and-rural access. Confirm whether the vehicle is on a village lot or a rural property before dispatch.
service_areas.parking_rule: Use driveway or yard-side access only where the customer confirms there is room and permission.
service_areas.noise_rule: Keep generator, vacuum, and compressor noise within normal daytime expectations for residential properties.
service_areas.water_rule: Treat runoff conservatively and keep products away from roadside ditches, gravel shoulders, and private drainage paths.
service_areas.access_rule: Ask about gravel lanes, turnaround room, water source, and outlet distance.

service_areas.label: Thamesford / Embro / Innerkip — Oxford County
service_areas.bylaw_note: This service zone spans more than one Oxford municipality, so driveway, parking, and setup expectations should be confirmed for the exact address before scheduling.
service_areas.parking_rule: Prefer confirmed private-property setup; do not assume roadside or shoulder parking is suitable for equipment staging.
service_areas.noise_rule: Use standard daytime-only detailing noise practices near homes and farm properties.
service_areas.water_rule: Keep runoff and debris contained away from ditches, catch basins, and shared private lanes.
service_areas.access_rule: Confirm exact town, road type, and turnaround room with the customer.

service_areas.label: Tavistock / Hickson — Oxford County
service_areas.bylaw_note: Village and rural properties in East Zorra-Tavistock need the exact address confirmed because setup room and access expectations can vary a lot.
service_areas.parking_rule: Use the customer driveway or lot and avoid shoulder parking for long jobs.
service_areas.noise_rule: Plan louder work for standard daytime hours only.
service_areas.water_rule: Keep wash runoff off roadside ditches and unmanaged gravel edges.
service_areas.access_rule: Confirm lane width, trailer turning room, and water/power availability.

service_areas.label: Beachville / South-West Oxford — Oxford County
service_areas.bylaw_note: South-West Oxford bookings should distinguish between village addresses and more rural properties before dispatching staff or trailers.
service_areas.parking_rule: Private-property access is preferred; avoid blocking farm lanes, sidewalks, or narrow residential streets.
service_areas.noise_rule: Minimize extended machine noise near homes and hamlet main streets.
service_areas.water_rule: Keep runoff controlled and away from ditches and low roadside areas.
service_areas.access_rule: Confirm exact address, driveway surface, and setup room.

service_areas.label: Plattsville / Blandford-Blenheim — Oxford County
service_areas.bylaw_note: Blandford-Blenheim work often mixes village and rural conditions. Confirm the exact location before assigning a larger crew or trailer.
service_areas.parking_rule: Keep support vehicles on-site and off travelled roads or narrow shoulders.
service_areas.noise_rule: Use daytime-only machine noise practices near residential properties.
service_areas.water_rule: Keep wastewater and debris off roadside drainage and private shared lanes.
service_areas.access_rule: Confirm driveway surface, slope, and available utility access.

service_areas.label: Rural Oxford County
service_areas.bylaw_note: Rural Oxford jobs need stronger pre-dispatch checks for driveway access, turnaround space, water supply, and safe work area.
service_areas.parking_rule: Do not assume roadside shoulders are suitable for support vehicles, trailers, or long-duration setup.
service_areas.noise_rule: Keep extended machine noise inside standard daytime work windows.
service_areas.water_rule: Protect wells, ditches, culverts, and gravel drainage paths from runoff or chemical carry-off.
service_areas.access_rule: Confirm road condition, driveway length, turnaround room, and utility distance.

service_areas.label: Simcoe — Norfolk County
service_areas.bylaw_note: Simcoe jobs should stay on private property whenever possible. Municipal parking, downtown activity, and residential noise expectations are the main operational considerations.
service_areas.parking_rule: Use driveway or private-lot setup. Confirm longer-duration parking before assigning a large crew or trailer.
service_areas.noise_rule: Keep louder detailing steps to daytime hours and avoid unnecessary idle or music noise near homes.
service_areas.water_rule: Keep runoff controlled and away from drains, curbs, and shared paved areas.
service_areas.access_rule: Confirm private-property working room and any building or condo access rules.

service_areas.label: Delhi — Norfolk County
service_areas.bylaw_note: Delhi bookings should confirm private-property working space and any downtown parking limitations before finalizing the schedule.
service_areas.parking_rule: Avoid street setup if the customer cannot confirm long-enough parking for the service window.
service_areas.noise_rule: Use normal daytime noise practices near homes and mixed-use streets.
service_areas.water_rule: Keep runoff controlled on site and away from public drains or roadside channels.
service_areas.access_rule: Confirm driveway or lot access before dispatch.

service_areas.label: Port Dover — Norfolk County
service_areas.bylaw_note: Port Dover needs stronger parking and arrival planning because waterfront and downtown rules are tighter during busier seasons.
service_areas.parking_rule: Check posted downtown, waterfront, and seasonal parking limits before assigning support vehicles or a crew trailer.
service_areas.noise_rule: Keep noisy work inside daytime windows and avoid unnecessary disturbance near tourist and residential areas.
service_areas.water_rule: Keep runoff well contained and away from curbs, lakefront drains, and public pedestrian areas.
service_areas.access_rule: Confirm off-street access, visitor traffic conditions, and any seasonal parking limits.

service_areas.label: Waterford — Norfolk County
service_areas.bylaw_note: Waterford bookings should confirm driveway or private-lot access and keep machine noise within normal daytime use.
service_areas.parking_rule: Avoid long street-side staging unless the customer has confirmed it is allowed.
service_areas.noise_rule: Use normal daytime detailing noise practices.
service_areas.water_rule: Control runoff and debris on site.
service_areas.access_rule: Confirm driveway space, hose reach, and outlet access.

service_areas.label: Port Rowan — Norfolk County
service_areas.bylaw_note: Port Rowan needs seasonal parking awareness and private-property setup confirmation before dispatch.
service_areas.parking_rule: Check waterfront and municipal-lot conditions before sending larger vehicles or crews.
service_areas.noise_rule: Keep machine noise to daytime windows only near homes and visitor areas.
service_areas.water_rule: Keep runoff away from curbs, drains, and shoreline-adjacent infrastructure.
service_areas.access_rule: Confirm parking room and turnaround space at the exact address.

service_areas.label: Langton — Norfolk County
service_areas.bylaw_note: Langton jobs should confirm driveway or lot setup and treat runoff conservatively around roadside ditches and low drainage areas.
service_areas.parking_rule: Prefer off-street setup for full or crew-sized jobs.
service_areas.noise_rule: Keep louder steps to standard daytime hours.
service_areas.water_rule: Avoid uncontrolled runoff to ditches or roadside drainage.
service_areas.access_rule: Confirm driveway width and utility access.

service_areas.label: Courtland — Norfolk County
service_areas.bylaw_note: Courtland work should be treated like a hamlet or rural-edge job: confirm driveway access, staging room, and utility reach before dispatch.
service_areas.parking_rule: Keep support vehicles fully on private property where possible.
service_areas.noise_rule: Use daytime-only machine noise practices.
service_areas.water_rule: Keep runoff and debris out of ditches and shared drainage edges.
service_areas.access_rule: Confirm exact property layout before crew assignment.

service_areas.label: Vittoria / St. Williams — Norfolk County
service_areas.bylaw_note: These hamlet-area bookings need exact-address confirmation because road, driveway, and seasonal visitor conditions can vary sharply.
service_areas.parking_rule: Use private-property staging only where the customer confirms enough room.
service_areas.noise_rule: Keep noisy steps inside daytime windows near homes and cottages.
service_areas.water_rule: Keep runoff away from roadside ditches and conservation-sensitive areas.
service_areas.access_rule: Confirm driveway width, turnaround room, and service utilities.

service_areas.value: Turkey Point / Long Point, Norfolk County
service_areas.label: Turkey Point / Long Point — Norfolk County
service_areas.bylaw_note: Beach-area jobs need the strongest seasonal parking and arrival planning. Dispatch should confirm exact parking availability before booking a crew or trailer.
service_areas.parking_rule: Seasonal and waterfront parking rules can change by location and time of year. Confirm off-street parking before final approval.
service_areas.noise_rule: Use daytime-only machine noise practices near cottages and vacation properties.
service_areas.water_rule: Keep runoff tightly contained and away from drains, shoreline areas, and sandy road edges.
service_areas.access_rule: Confirm the exact address, parking plan, and seasonal traffic conditions.

service_areas.label: Walsh / Walsingham — Norfolk County
service_areas.bylaw_note: Walsh and Walsingham bookings should be treated as rural setups: confirm access, utility reach, and turnaround room before dispatch.
service_areas.parking_rule: Do not assume roadside staging is suitable for equipment, vans, or trailers.
service_areas.noise_rule: Keep extended machine noise inside daytime work windows.
service_areas.water_rule: Keep runoff and debris away from ditches, gravel edges, and rural drainage features.
service_areas.access_rule: Confirm driveway length, surface, and available setup room.

service_areas.label: Rural Norfolk County
service_areas.bylaw_note: Rural Norfolk jobs need stronger dispatch checks for long driveways, well/water access, outlet reach, and safe trailer turnaround.
service_areas.parking_rule: Keep all support vehicles on the customer property and out of travelled roads or soft shoulders.
service_areas.noise_rule: Use standard daytime-only machine-noise practices.
service_areas.water_rule: Protect ditches, culverts, wells, and unpaved drainage paths from runoff or carry-off.
service_areas.access_rule: Confirm road conditions, driveway length, turnaround room, and customer-provided utilities.

public_requirements: Customer provides power and water or additional fees may apply
One vehicle per day unless half-day jobs are confirmed

travel_pricing.notes: Travel charges are managed centrally in App Management.
